strap: What this region's UKRI footprint actually looks like

bullets.html: £4.56bn UKRI lead-led across 5,718 grants spanning 6 active clusters
Largest cluster: Greater Glasgow Digital Creative at 24% of regional £ (£1.12bn)
Region-wide lead: UNIVERSITY OF GLASGOW — £1.36bn across all clusters (30% of regional £)
55 Companies House-traced spin-outs region-wide → £83m UKRI per spin-out
